name: kongcode
description: Graph-backed persistent memory engine for Claude Code. SurrealDB + BGE-M3 vector embeddings that learn across sessions.

scripts.sea: npm run bundle && node --experimental-sea-config sea-config.json && cp $(command -v node) dist/bin/kongcode-$(node -e "console.log(process.platform+'-'+process.arch)") && npx postject dist/bin/kongcode-$(node -e "console.log(process.platform+'-'+process.arch)") NODE_SEA_BLOB dist/sea-prep.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2
scripts.sea:daemon: npm run bundle:daemon && node --experimental-sea-config sea-daemon-config.json && mkdir -p dist/bin && cp $(command -v node) dist/bin/kongcode-daemon-$(node -e "console.log(process.platform+'-'+process.arch)") && npx postject dist/bin/kongcode-daemon-$(node -e "console.log(process.platform+'-'+process.arch)") NODE_SEA_BLOB dist/daemon-sea-prep.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2
scripts.sea:mcp: npm run bundle:mcp && node --experimental-sea-config sea-mcp-config.json && mkdir -p dist/bin && cp $(command -v node) dist/bin/kongcode-mcp-$(node -e "console.log(process.platform+'-'+process.arch)") && npx postject dist/bin/kongcode-mcp-$(node -e "console.log(process.platform+'-'+process.arch)") NODE_SEA_BLOB dist/mcp-sea-prep.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2
scripts.sea:all: npm run sea:daemon && npm run sea:mcp
